expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers OK or Cancel semantics, pending selection state, and dismissal correctness for multi-selection workflows
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus and covers it in acceptance criteria sections: “Focus: Shipment checkpoint covers OK/Cancel semantics, pending selection state, and dismissal correctness for multi-selection workflows.” It then details A) OK/Cancel semantics, B) pending vs committed state, and C) dismissal correctness for multi-selection.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement (Advisory)” and includes “Primary phase under test: phase5b (checkpoint enforcement)” and is structured as “Phase 5b — Shipment Checkpoint: Acceptance Criteria (Advisory)”.
